ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group category (e.g., <15, 15-24) */,
  "male_count" INTEGER /* Count of males in the age group */,
  "female_count" INTEGER /* Count of females in the age group */,
  "diverse_count" INTEGER /* Count of individuals from diverse backgrounds in the age group */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total count of individuals in the age group */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total population represented by this age group */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source from which the demographic data was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., <15, 15-24) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age of the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age of the age group */,
  "age_range_type" TEXT /* Type of age range (e.g., exact, range) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_counts" (
  "gender_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender count entry */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic entry it relates to */,
  "male_count" INTEGER /* Count of males */,
  "female_count" INTEGER /* Count of females */,
  "diverse_count" INTEGER /* Count of diverse individuals */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gender count entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gender count entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_counts_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population count */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of individuals */,
  "male_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total population that are males */,
  "female_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total population that are females */,
  "diverse_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total population that are from diverse backgrounds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the summary entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the summary entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., online, field survey) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "accessed_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed data */,
  "accessed_table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_initiatives" (
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each initiative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the initiative */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the initiative */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the initiative */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the initiative */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the initiative */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the initiative entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the initiative entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data_collection" (
  "data_collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection entry */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic entry it relates to */,
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the initiative from which data was collected */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source from which the demographic data was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data collection entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data collection entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_collection_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_collection_initiative_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiative_id") REFERENCES data_collection_initiatives ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_collection_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table to which access is controlled */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action allowed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
